description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun with a striking neon green and dark blue geometric pattern covering its entire body. The weapon features a short barrel, a prominent upper receiver with a Picatinny rail, and a pistol grip with textured detailing for enhanced handling. The stock is minimalistic and integrated into the rear of the weapon, suggesting a design optimized for close-quarters use. The magazine is inserted into the grip, typical of submachine gun designs, and the front and rear iron sights are visible along the top rail. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with polymer components, giving it a robust yet lightweight feel. The vivid color scheme and angular motifs make it visually distinctive, likely intended for high visibility or a futuristic urban aesthetic.
description: A compact, neon green and dark blue submachine gun with geometric patterns, short barrel, and integrated stock. Features include a Picatinny rail, iron sights, and a magazine in the grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and symmetrical geometric patterns on the foregrip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the weapon, magazine in the grip, and detailed patterning along the receiver and stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, rear sight, and the continuation of the geometric design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, trigger, and the same vibrant patterning as the left side.
